title: Sable: Weighted - Create: Deco
body:
**Adds full block physics weighting for Create Deco when using the Sable physics system.**

~~Every structural, decorative, and utility block from Create Deco is assigned a mass and volume based on its real-world analogue, so large builds behave more consistently and intuitively.~~

---

**Features**
- Complete coverage of Create Deco blocks
- ~~Realistic mass scaling based on material (andesite, zinc, brass, copper, iron, cast iron, gold, netherite)~~

***This has since been reworked to adhere to the same weighting principles as vanilla/create blocks.***
- Form-based weighting (sheet metal, bars, catwalks, ladders, supports, doors, etc.)
- Adjusted volume for partial blocks (slabs, stairs, railings, overlays)
- Lightweight handling for thin geometry (bars, ladders, mesh, windows)
- ~~Heavier values for dense industrial materials and full blocks~~
- Consistent behavior across decorative and structural elements

---

**Installation:**
Simply place this mod jar inside your `mods` folder
